{{Quote|Pass him enough money and he becomes positively reliable.|[[Mazzic]]|<ref name="Specter of the Past">''[[Specter of the Past]]''</ref>}}
'''Cromf''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Garoos]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] working for [[Mazzic]] to find the [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] [[Lak Jit]]. He was successful in his hunt.

==Appearances==
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
